creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've made some tests and could not reproduce the problem, actually, --mandir
param is passed to configure script and it works fine.

root@botelhor:/home/garga/prs/clamav# find /usr/local/man -iname '*clam*'
/usr/local/man/man1/clamconf.1.gz
/usr/local/man/man1/clamscan.1.gz
/usr/local/man/man1/clamdscan.1.gz
/usr/local/man/man1/freshclam.1.gz
/usr/local/man/man5/freshclam.conf.5.gz
/usr/local/man/man5/clamd.conf.5.gz
/usr/local/man/man8/clamd.8.gz
/usr/local/man/man8/clamav-milter.8.gz

i've created a package without problems.

Thanks
-- 
Renato Botelho <garga @ FreeBSD.org>
               <garga @ freebsdbrasil.com.br>

Don't abandon hope.
Your Captain Midnight decoder ring arrives tomorrow.
